account_id.description: Stable identifier for the account, derived from transcripts or filenames.

business_hours.description: Human-readable business hours description as stated in transcripts.

office_address.description: Primary office address as stated in transcripts.

services_supported.description: List of services the agent can handle, taken directly from transcripts when mentioned.

emergency_definition.description: How the business defines an emergency, quoted or summarized from transcripts.

emergency_routing_rules.description: Operational rules for routing emergency calls.

non_emergency_routing_rules.description: Operational rules for routing non-emergency calls.

call_transfer_rules.description: Rules for transferring calls, including targets and fallback behaviors.

integration_constraints.description: Constraints related to EHR/CRM/other integrations, if explicitly mentioned.

after_hours_flow_summary.description: Narrative summary of how after-hours calls should be handled.

office_hours_flow_summary.description: Narrative summary of how office-hours calls should be handled.

questions_or_unknowns.description: Questions and missing pieces of configuration that could not be reliably extracted.

notes.description: Additional implementation notes or clarifications from transcripts.
